title: Sentry Issue
description: Represents an issue (group) in Sentry. Issues are aggregated groups of similar error events, providing a deduplicated view of recurring problems in an application.

id.description: The unique identifier of the issue.

shortId.description: The short ID for the issue (e.g., PROJECT-123), used in the Sentry UI.

title.description: The title of the issue, typically the error type and message.

culprit.description: The function or module where the issue originated.

permalink.description: The permanent URL to view this issue in the Sentry UI.

level.description: The severity level of the issue.

status.description: The current status of the issue.

platform.description: The platform that generated the issue.

firstSeen.description: When the issue was first seen.

lastSeen.description: When the issue was most recently seen.

count.description: The total number of events for this issue.

userCount.description: The number of unique users affected by this issue.

filename.description: The filename where the error occurred.

function.description: The function where the error occurred.

assignedTo.description: The user or team assigned to this issue.

isPublic.description: Whether the issue is publicly visible.

hasSeen.description: Whether the authenticated user has seen this issue.

isBookmarked.description: Whether the issue is bookmarked by the authenticated user.

project.description: The project this issue belongs to.
